task_completion.visual_evidence: LibreOffice Base is open and the title bar or connection details show 'chinook.odb'.

task_completion.description: Rename InvoiceLine and PlaylistTrack tables to lowercase_snake_case
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Tables list in the main Base window shows 'invoice_line' and 'playlist_track', OR the 'Execute SQL Statement' window shows successful execution of ALTER TABLE commands renaming 'InvoiceLine' and 'PlaylistTrack' using double quotes.

task_completion.description: Rename the 'Name' column in Genre, MediaType, Artist, and Playlist tables
task_completion.visual_evidence: Table Design views or opened tables show the columns 'genre_name', 'type_name', 'artist_name', and 'playlist_name', OR the SQL execution window shows successful ALTER TABLE ... RENAME COLUMN commands for these tables using double quotes.

task_completion.description: Rename the 'Title' column in the Album table
task_completion.visual_evidence: Table Design view or opened table shows the column 'album_title' for the Album table, OR the SQL execution window shows a successful ALTER TABLE command renaming 'Title' to 'album_title' using double quotes.
The agent clicks the Save icon (floppy disk), uses File -> Save, or the main LibreOffice Base window is shown with the updated table names and no unsaved changes indicator.

integrity.description: The agent used a genuine database tool (LibreOffice Base or a database CLI)
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with LibreOffice Base (or a terminal running a database shell), not a text editor or word processor.

integrity.description: The agent did not drop and recreate tables to rename them
integrity.visual_evidence: No 'DROP TABLE' commands are visible in the SQL execution window or terminal. The agent used RENAME commands or the GUI rename functionality.

integrity.description: The agent used double quotes for identifiers if using SQL
integrity.visual_evidence: If SQL commands are visible, table and column names are wrapped in double quotes (e.g., "invoice_line") to preserve lowercase.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The Chinook database contains specific tables and columns that must be renamed to lowercase_snake_case. Expected table renames: 'InvoiceLine' -> 'invoice_line', 'PlaylistTrack' -> 'playlist_track'. Expected column renames: Genre.'Name' -> 'genre_name', MediaType.'Name' -> 'type_name', Artist.'Name' -> 'artist_name', Playlist.'Name' -> 'playlist_name', Album.'Title' -> 'album_title'. Original row counts (InvoiceLine: 2240, PlaylistTrack: 8715, Genre: 25, MediaType: 5, Artist: 275, Playlist: 18, Album: 347) must remain intact.
